sections.title: Talking to a messenger that isn't for you, or after already getting the invitation

lines.speaker: Messenger
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have anything for you right now.

lines.speaker: Messenger
lines.text: Hello there. I have a message for you.

lines.speaker: Messenger
lines.text: Hello there. I have a message for you, but you'll need to make some room for it.

lines.speaker: Messenger
lines.text: [player name]? I have a message for you.

lines.speaker: Messenger
lines.text: [player name]? You've been sent a message.
